strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js expertise with production experience at scale (Optilyz, RIDE Capital, re:cinq)
Active AI agent and MCP framework development at current role directly matches the AI agent development requirement
15+ years of full-stack breadth across frontend, backend, databases, cloud, and DevOps — well above the 6-year threshold
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned despite it being the primary backend framework
Kotlin/Java exposure appears shallow (robotic arm work at Altom), with most backend work in Node.js and D lang
Testing framework experience leans toward custom D-lang tooling (Fluent-Asserts, Trial) rather than the required Jest/Vitest/Playwright stack
response.justification: Bogdan is a strong match on the core stack and an unusually good match on AI agent development, which is an emerging and often hard-to-find requirement. His seniority and polyglot background give confidence in architectural judgment and adaptability. The primary gap is Nest.js, which is the team's primary backend framework, but his deep Node.js experience and pattern of quickly adopting new tooling (e.g., taking over iOS development at WatchUp) suggest this is a ramp-up risk rather than a disqualifier.
